title: UpdateGranulesCmrMetadataFileLinksConfig
description: Describes the config used by the update-granules-cmr-metadata-file-links task

buckets.description: aws s3 buckets used by this task

\\S*.description: bucket configuration for the key'd bucket

type.description: the type of bucket - i.e. internal, public, private, protected

distribution_endpoint.description: The api distribution endpoint. Used as the fallback when distribution_endpoint_per_cmr_provider has no entry for cmr_provider.

distribution_endpoint_per_cmr_provider.description: Map of CMR provider short_name to distribution endpoint URL. Used in consolidated deployments to route distribution URLs per Collection.cmrProvider.

cmr_provider.description: The CMR provider short_name for the granule's collection. Used to look up the per-provider distribution endpoint.

cmrGranuleUrlType.description: The type of URL to add to the Online Access URLs in the CMR file. 'distribution' to point to the distribution API, 's3' to put in the S3 link, and 'none' to not add Online Access URLs for the granules.

excludeFileRegex.description: A regex string to match files that should be excluded from the CMR metadata file

excludeDataGranule.description: Flag to set exclusion behavior of DataGranule metadata updates as part of this task. if True, will disable updates

updateGranuleIdentifiers.description: Flag to set exclusion behavior of Identifier and granuleUr metadata updates as part of this task. If false, will disable updates
